strengths: 15+ years of hands-on engineering across software, hardware, and infrastructure with consistent technical depth and adaptability across languages and domains.
Proven AI-agent infrastructure and tooling contributions at re:cinq, plus direct experience building open-source AI-adjacent platforms (GISCollective) with real-world adoption by NGOs.
Demonstrated leadership in technical innovation through founder initiatives, workshop creation, and cross-stack ownership — including full-stack product delivery and dev-ops infrastructure.
concerns: No explicit master's or PhD in AI-related field, though practical AI experience is evident.
Limited public documentation of AI-powered product platforms built from end-to-end (vs. infrastructure/tooling contributions).
German language proficiency is basic, which may impact direct customer advisory in German-speaking markets.
response.justification: Bogdan’s 15+ years of diverse engineering leadership, direct contributions to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, and founder-driven development of open-source platforms used by real organizations align powerfully with the role’s need for strategic AI innovation and technical inspiration — his fluency across cloud, AI-adjacent tooling, and full-stack delivery, combined with proven ability to lead through technical craftsmanship, makes him a compelling fit despite lacking a formal AI advanced degree.
